heading: Authority to engage in debt-for-nature swaps and debt buybacks
label: 2431f Authority to engage in debt-for-nature swaps and debt buybacks

children.heading: Loans and credits eligible for sale, reduction, or cancellation
children.label: a Loans and credits eligible for sale, reduction, or cancellation

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the President may, in accordance with this section, sell to any eligible purchaser described in subparagraph (B) any concessional loans described in or any credits described in , or on receipt of payment from an eligible purchaser described in subparagraph (B), reduce or cancel such loans (or credits) or portion thereof, only for the purpose of facilitating a debt-for-nature swap to support eligible activities described in .section 2431d(a)(1) of this titlesection 2431e(a)(1) of this titlesection 2431g(d) of this title

children.heading: Eligible purchaser described
children.label: B Eligible purchaser described
children.text: A loan or credit may be sold, reduced, or canceled under subparagraph (A) only to a purchaser who presents plans satisfactory to the President for using the loan or credit for the purpose of engaging in debt-for-nature swaps to support eligible activities described in .section 2431g(d) of this title

children.heading: Consultation requirement
children.label: C Consultation requirement
children.text: Before the sale under subparagraph (A) to any eligible purchaser described in subparagraph (B), or any reduction or cancellation under such subparagraph (A), of any loan or credit made to an eligible country, the President shall consult with the country concerning the amount of loans or credits to be sold, reduced, or canceled and their uses for debt-for-nature swaps to support eligible activities described in .section 2431g(d) of this title

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: D Authorization of appropriations
children.text: For the cost (as defined in ) for the reduction of any debt pursuant to subparagraph (A), amounts authorized to be appropriated under sections 2431d(a)(2), 2431e(a)(2), and 2431d(d) of this title shall be made available for such reduction of debt pursuant to subparagraph (A).section 661a(5) of title 2

children.heading: Debt buybacks
children.label: 2 Debt buybacks
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the President may, in accordance with this section, sell to any eligible country any concessional loans described in or any credits described in , or on receipt of payment from an eligible country, reduce or cancel such loans (or credits) or portion thereof, only for the purpose of facilitating a debt buyback by an eligible country of its own qualified debt, only if the eligible country uses an additional amount of the local currency of the eligible country, equal to not less than the lessor of 40 percent of the price paid for such debt by such eligible country, or the difference between the price paid for such debt and the face value of such debt, to support eligible activities described in .section 2431d(a)(1) of this titlesection 2431e(a)(1) of this titlesection 2431g(d) of this title

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: 3 Limitation
children.text: The authority provided by paragraphs (1) and (2) shall be available only to the extent that appropriations for the cost (as defined in ) of the modification of any debt pursuant to such paragraphs are made in advance.section 661a(5) of title 2

children.heading: Terms and conditions
children.label: 4 Terms and conditions
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the President shall, in accordance with this section, establish the terms and conditions under which loans and credits may be sold, reduced, or canceled pursuant to this section.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Facility shall notify the administrator of the agency primarily responsible for administering subchapter I of this chapter or the Commodity Credit Corporation, as the case may be, of eligible purchasers described in paragraph (1)(B) that the President has determined to be eligible under paragraph (1), and shall direct such agency or Corporation, as the case may be, to carry out the sale, reduction, or cancellation of a loan pursuant to such paragraph.

children.heading: Additional requirement
children.label: B Additional requirement
children.text: Such agency or Corporation, as the case may be, shall make an adjustment in its accounts to reflect the sale, reduction, or cancellation.

children.heading: United States Government representation on the administering body
children.label: C United States Government representation on the administering body
children.text: One or more individuals appointed by the United States Government shall serve in an official capacity on the administering body that oversees the implementation of grants arising from a debt-for-nature swap or debt buyback regardless of whether the United States is a party to any agreement between the eligible purchaser and the government of the beneficiary country.

children.heading: Deposit of proceeds
children.label: b Deposit of proceeds
children.text: The proceeds from the sale, reduction, or cancellation of any loan sold, reduced, or canceled pursuant to this section shall be deposited in the United States Government account or accounts established for the repayment of such loan.
